programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Gently and Bacchus investigate a very disturbed family after the body of young woman was found murdered.

programme.title: Gorillas in the Mist
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of wildlife expert Dian Fossey's autobiography. Midwesterner Fossey leaves the United States for Africa, where she studies the gorillas of Rwanda and Uganda. As Fossey develops a bond with the animals, she also becomes wary of the poachers who prey on them. Fearing that the gorillas will go extinct if humans continue to hunt them, she organizes a defense league to protect the animals; in doing so, though, she puts herself in a perilous situation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Sigourney Weaver, The Most Iconic Action Heroine
programme.desc: A look back at actress Sigourney Weaver's career in cinema and the impact of her roles in action, comedy and drama.

programme.title: Gorillas in the Mist
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of wildlife expert Dian Fossey's autobiography. Midwesterner Fossey leaves the United States for Africa, where she studies the gorillas of Rwanda and Uganda. As Fossey develops a bond with the animals, she also becomes wary of the poachers who prey on them. Fearing that the gorillas will go extinct if humans continue to hunt them, she organizes a defense league to protect the animals; in doing so, though, she puts herself in a perilous situation.

programme.title: American Masters
programme.desc: Theatrical producer and director Joe Papp establishes The Public Theater in Manhattan.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items reflect 250 years of American art, artifacts, crafts and collectibles; finds include a flag quilt circa 1880, a Tiffany Studios turtleback glass shade circa 1915 and an 1884 Edison light bulb.

programme.desc: Fred and Mr. McFeely visit a recycling center.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Dream Bouncy Castle for her party; Francine and Muffy set up their older siblings.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris stumble upon a rare and endangered seedling of a butternut tree; while looking for its parent tree, they only discover dead ones.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Our Blue and Green World
programme.desc: While doing their annual Laundry Day, the Kratt brothers disagree on what is better -- blue oceans or green forests.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.desc: Carl can't wait for the ice cream festival; Carl is upset that he has to wear a cast on his broken wrist.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Plays T-ball; Max Plays at the Library
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends play T-ball and find that Henrietta is a dance teacher and a T-ball coach.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: Hacker positions giant patches of trash in cyberspace in a plan to finally shut down Motherboard once and for all.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A Walpole ranch is reimagined with an ADU for aging parents, a primary suite bump-out, smarter baths and better flow from garage to new mudroom and kitchen.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Basic tools and supplies needed to paint a room; compost versus disposal; how to run underground power from a house to a shed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: On Story
programme.sub-title: A Conversation With Lauren Shuler Donner
programme.desc: Producer Lauren Shuler Donner discusses launching the X-Men franchise, standing up for her story convictions and producing "Free Willy.".

programme.title: State of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Rhythm & Roots: New Jersey's Heritage Fellowships
programme.desc: New Jersey Heritage Fellowships honor artists who preserve cultural traditions by grounding them in community, history, and place. On this special of State of the Arts, we meet three fellowship winners: Alessandra Belloni, performer and teacher of Tarantella, an ancient healing dance from Southern Italy; Tyrese Bright Flower Gould Jacinto, a Nanticoke Lenni-Lenape member, artist, and community leader; and Neelima Raju Kakarlapudi, a master of the dramatic Indian dance form of Kuchipudi.

programme.title: 5 Minute Yoga Fix With Peggy Cappy
programme.desc: Peggy Cappy presents short exercise breaks that help strengthen and maintain the four pillars that support the body's structure -- strength, flexibility, balance and mobility.

programme.title: Tom Lehrer -- Live in Copenhagen 1967
programme.desc: A rare concert recording from 1967 features 18 of Tom Lehrer's best-known songs, including "The Elements" and "The Vatican Rag.".

programme.title: Mister Rogers: It's You I Like
programme.desc: Celebrities, cast members and Joanne Rogers recall their favorite moments from "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" as they celebrate the 50th anniversary of the series.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: The barbecue traditions of Lockhart, Texas; cooking barbecued chuck roast; the origins of ranch dressing; preparing tomatillo and Bibb lettuce salad with tomatillo ranch.

programme.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
programme.desc: The secrets of great strudel and schnitzel; making Austrian pork schnitzel; how to make homemade spatzle.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Crab and shrimp stew; reviewing gyuto knives; fresh salmon burgers with Sriracha mayonnaise.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Crespelle manicotti with spinach; shrimp and spaghetti in lemon cream sauce.

programme.title: History With David Rubenstein
programme.desc: Author and historian Marie Arana explains how Spain was involved in the colonies' fight for independence.

programme.title: Immutable
programme.desc: A group of students from the Washington Urban Debate League attend a summer camp where they sharpen arguments that reflect their own lives.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: An expectant father receives a life-threatening diagnosis; Trixie assists a female wrestler after a headlock goes wrong; Dr. Turner learns shocking news that implicates the future of the maternity house.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Soames commissions a country house despite Irene's distress; as Louisa faces a fresh start, Jo decides his future; Ann reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: In Paris high society, Edmond meddles in the lives of those he wishes to destroy; Edmond struggles to conceal his identity from Mercedes.

programme.title: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: Lukas and Nina investigate when a body is discovered in a dumpster; the town is shaken by the spread of a deadly virus.

programme.title: Austin City Limits
programme.desc: This long-running concert series features artists from every musical genre in a live-music setting. Originally created to shine a spotlight on original Texas music, the show has expanded its boundaries to encompass a wide range of styles and artists, featuring notables such as Pearl Jam, Elvis Costello, Johnny Cash and Neil Young.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Caverns Sessions
programme.desc: Best known for his electric guitar, Buckethead's music spans metal, funk, blues, jazz, bluegrass and avant-garde.

programme.title: Shakespeare: Rise of a Genius
programme.desc: Shakespeare's life and legacy are threatened when the Gunpowder Plot unearths a secret he has worked all his life to bury; when his daughter is implicated in the fallout, Shakespeare produces "Macbeth.".

programme.title: Wilding
programme.desc: Isabella Tree and her husband, Charlie Burrell, strive to breathe new life into the ailing Knepp estate. They reintroduce native ponies, deer, pigs and other wildlife, allowing nature to thrive.

programme.sub-title: The Director's Cut; Crime and Consequences

programme.desc: A power suit malfunction turns Martin into an oak tree.

programme.title: DW News

programme.title: BBC News America

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.sub-title: The Times That Try Men's Souls
programme.desc: British General Howe defeats General Washington, forcing the Americans to abandon New York; Washington's army regroups in New Jersey before attacking an outpost at Trenton.
